# DO NOT EDIT — legacy static UI

This directory is legacy static UI kept only as migration/archive
reference. Do not add features, polish, branding, or copy here.

**Product UI lives in `free-intelligence/apps/activist-os/web`**
(Next.js — deployed at https://aos.bernarduriza.com).

See `.claude/rules/ui.md` § "Single UI source of truth". These files move
to `archive/legacy-static-web/` after the hackathon.

The one exception: `checklist.html` remains the internal status board
until its `/checklist` route replacement lands.
